dialogue_texts: I've seen some messy basements in my time, but this place is a real dump.
It's got all the gloom of a graveyard with none of the cool ghosts.
And the smell! This glohm stuff reeks of stagnant magic and overdue library books.
As the Queen, I'm declaring this whole manor a biohazard.
So much noise... Even in the depths of the dream, the outside world insists on screaming its presence.
Hey, I think that red coat has to be glohm.
It looks a little too spiritually bankrupt for the kingdom.
So loud... Why must the living always bring their noise into the shadows?
Can't you see I've finally found a way to stop feeling?
Stop feeling? That's the most boring magic trick I've ever heard of.
I can smell the glohm on you from here. It's that red aura. It's not power; it's a cage.
A beautiful, motionless peace where the heart doesn't have to break because it no longer beats for the world.
A heart that doesn't beat is just a fancy rock.
I don't let rocks sit around looking miserable in my territory!
Then you are just another storm, trying to stir the dust. See if you can survive the weight of my silence!
